questions.q: In April 2026, a former local leader of Viktor Orbán’s Fidesz party, Feríz Rádi, was arrested at the Budapest airport in connection with what type of crime?
A 2026 brain scan study of children showed that understanding language and what other complex cognitive function have distinct, non-overlapping origins in the brain?
Reported around April 28, 2026, which Canadian telecommunications company announced it was offering voluntary buyout packages to 50 percent of its workforce?
In April 2026, scientists captured the most detailed structural images to date of which protein's DNA repair process, offering clues to inhibit BRCA mutations?
India's Sun Pharma announced it is acquiring which U.S. healthcare firm in an $11.75 billion all-cash deal?
Which pizza chain saw its stock fall after reporting a disappointing 0.9% U.S. same-store sales increase for Q1 2026? [1.7]

In late April 2026, tech giants including Apple and Google successfully waged a multi-million dollar lobbying campaign to crush which California bill that would have prohibited them from favoring their own products over smaller rivals?
options: The Innovation and Choice Online Act

questions.q: What is the title of the Michael Jackson biopic that shattered box office records with a $97 million U.S. opening weekend?
According to late April 2026 news, Ontario Premier Doug Ford was found to be regularly working from home in January despite mandating what group to return to the office full-time?
According to a late April 2026 report on San Francisco's '10B' program, which tech company spent nearly $728,000 to hire off-duty SFPD officers for armed protection in 2024?
